name: HMS Kittern (T 382)
events: 13 Jan 1944 HMS Varangian (Lt. S.J. Fovargue, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Tobermory with HMS Kittern (A/Skr.Lt. C.A. Johnson, RNR) and HMCS Forrest Hill (T/Lt. E.U. Jones, RCNVR). (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
